== Notes for [[Item:Q108563|Q108563]] ==

کعب

----

Source:

https://en.m.wikipedia.org/wiki/Murrah_ibn_Ka%27b

https://en.m.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ka%27b_ibn_Lu%27ayy


Children
Murrah ibn Ka'b, Adiy ibn Ka'b, Husays ibn Ka'b

Parent(s)
Lu'ayy ibn Ghalib
Ma'wiyah bint Ka`b (Banu Quda'a)

----

----

Lineage of Zubayr ibn Awwam who descended from Asad ibn Abd al-Uzza. < [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Asad_ibn_Abd_al-Uzza Wikipedia] >

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000003025356494

[[Category:Possibly derived from wikipedia]]
[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
